messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Checking. Looks like 47 customer support tickets in 2 hours: 'discount not showing at checkout'. Investigating.

messages.author: jake_wilson
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Found the issue: The cache invalidation webhook began silently failing 6 days ago after a service.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
